markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review ICP criteria and discuss recent client acquisitions to refine sales qualification process.](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [ICP evolving: focus on factors beyond company stage (e.g., technical complexity, review process)](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Warm intros and Marcel's connections heavily influence client selection](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Need for deeper discovery questions to uncover client expectations and content quality requirements](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Balancing technical complexity with ability to deliver high-quality content remains a challenge](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)

## Topics

### ICP Refinement

  - [Moving beyond simple stage-based criteria (e.g., seed vs. series A)](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Factors like warm intros, Marcel's connections, and willingness to invest in content weigh heavily](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [BlackSoul example: $7.2M seed round, COO of Airbyte referral, commitment to content investment](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Aim to avoid early-stage companies unless they meet specific criteria](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)

### Technical Complexity Considerations

  - [Not avoiding all technical clients, but assessing level of innovation and thought leadership required](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Key questions:](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [Is content cutting-edge or explaining existing concepts?](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [Can AI assist in content generation, or is human expertise crucial?](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [Is there a dedicated technical champion for efficient reviews?](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

### Content Quality and Expectations

  - [Need to understand client's vision of "done" and quality bar](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Questions to ask:](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [Favorite current blog posts and why?](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
      - [Competitor content they admire?](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
      - [Expectations for visual elements (e.g., charts, screenshots, code snippets)?](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [Importance of aligning with brand style and tone](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

### Review Process

  - [Crucial to establish clear review process and identify key stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Aim for single point of technical review when possible](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Understand hierarchy: Does CEO supersede technical expert? Are there multiple stakeholders?](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Operational Maturity

  - [Assess client's existing materials and understanding of goals](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Example: Metronome's white paper provided content foundation despite review challenges](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)

### Current Pipeline

  - [Focus on bringing in strong logos with manageable complexity](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Key prospects: Redis, Vizcom, BlackSoul, Cresta](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Longer-term opportunities: Brex, Zapier, Navon (longer procurement processes)](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George to send list of discovery questions for sales process](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [George to provide top 3 kickoff call recordings for Tyler to study](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [Tyler to continue surfacing potential deals in DealDesk channel](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Team to refine ICP criteria and apply learnings to upcoming client acquisitions](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Improve pre-sales qualification process to better align with delivery capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/LWuvWHmpshtebhNG8CnwqQEshqFsMGrA?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
